subject: Project pulse: mainecoon execution in Vancouver | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-2621
body: Following yesterday's call, the mainecoon effort in Vancouver needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Pablo Picasso seems to disagree with Nikola Tesla on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-2621. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: handoff, drop-bears.
